creator: freebsd@gushi.org
text:
I also suggest:

- fix warnings from portclippy,

Straightforward, I'll do that in my own time (i.e. not on this issue).  I think I last tested this with only portlint (and poudriere testport).

- adjust whitespaces,

Could you clarify?

- remove GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX,

I didn't know that was a thing, but sure, can do that (again, outside of scope for this issue)

- use "${DISTVERSION:S/./-/g}" in GH_TAGNAME instead of hardcoded version "1-4-2":

Can also do that!

-Dan
